allow: Bash(powershell -Command "& { Get-Command dotnet -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Source; if\(-not \(Get-Command dotnet -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\)\) { 'NOT_FOUND' } }")

Bash(powershell -Command "& 'C:\\Program Files \(x86\)\\Microsoft Visual Studio\\Installer\\vswhere.exe' -all -format json 2>$null | ConvertFrom-Json | Select-Object displayName, installationVersion, installationPath" 2>&1)

Bash(powershell -Command "& 'C:\\Program Files \(x86\)\\Microsoft Visual Studio\\Installer\\vswhere.exe' -all -format json | ConvertFrom-Json | ForEach-Object { $_.displayName + ' | ' + $_.installationVersion + ' | ' + $_.installationPath }")
Bash(powershell -Command "Get-ChildItem node_modules\\winax -Recurse | Select-Object Name, FullName | Format-Table -AutoSize")
Bash(powershell -Command "Get-Content electron/main.ts | Measure-Object -Line | Select Lines; Get-Content electron/preload.ts | Measure-Object -Line | Select Lines")
